nodes.name: network
nodes.class_name:
MLP(
  (layers): ModuleList(
    (0): SineLayer(
      (linear): Linear(in_features=3, out_features=128, bias=True)
    )
    (1-4): 4 x SineLayer(
      (linear): Linear(in_features=128, out_features=128, bias=True)
    )
    (5): Linear(in_features=128, out_features=5, bias=True)
  )
  (sigmoid): Sigmoid()
  (relu): ReLU()
  (softmax): Softmax(dim=-1)
)
